Extra
6.Tables7.Markdown Syntax

Type to search titles, headings, and page content.

Search is ready. Try a page title, a section heading, or a phrase from the content.

Documentation

Use this page as the map for the rest of the site.

Marque stays intentionally small on purpose.

  • pages/ is your source content
  • navigation.mq is your navigation tree
  • marque.toml is your default configuration
  • directives, themes, and layouts are where the custom work starts

Start here

If you are new to Marque, do these two pages first and come back once the starter site is running.

Quickstart Create a site

CLI

Every terminal command in one place: new, serve, build, migrate, theme-template, and help.

Open CLI docs

Configuration

Learn which file owns which decision: marque.toml, frontmatter, navigation.mq, themes, and layouts.

Open configuration Navigation Frontmatter

Directives

This is the authoring layer that makes .mq feel like more than plain markdown.

Open directives

Migration

Bringing an existing docs project over? Start with the migration overview, then move into the source-specific guide.

Migration overview From mdBook From MkDocs

Themes and layouts

Visual style and automatic page chrome are separate on purpose. Theme the site in CSS, then decide where navigation lives with layouts.

Layouts Themes

Read by goal

I want to launch a site

Finish Quickstart.

Read Create Website so the starter folder stops feeling magical.

Use CLI Commands as your command reference.

I want to change the site

Start at Configuration.

Go deeper with Frontmatter, Layouts, and Themes.

Use navigation.mq when the thing you want to change is the menu, not the page itself.

I want to author richer pages

Use plain markdown for the content that should stay plain.

Use Directives for rows, cards, callouts, steps, and project components.

Add project directives in directives/ when the starter blocks stop being enough.

I want to migrate an existing site

Start with the Migration overview.

Choose the mdBook or MkDocs guide.

Treat migration-notes.mq as a review list, not a decorative extra.

If you only want the short version: get the site running, edit navigation.mq, then learn configuration and directives as soon as you start pushing past the starter template.

Built with Marque
